summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Daire Yönetimi (Unit Management) feature - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly
passed_tests: Admin Login (/admin/login) - admin/admin123 credentials work
Admin Projects page navigation - accessible and displays all projects
Project edit dialog opens correctly with all fields
Daire Yönetimi section visible in edit dialog
Daire Ekle button adds new unit rows
Unit row contains: Daire No, Kat, Tip (dropdown), m², Fiyat, Durum (dropdown), Sil button
Multiple units can be added and filled
Durum dropdown works (Satışta/available, Satıldı/sold, Rezerve/reserved)
Summary badges calculate correctly (Toplam, Satışta, Satıldı, Rezerve)
Delete button removes unit rows
Project save persists units to database
Units persist after reopening project edit dialog
Project detail page (/projeler/{id}) displays units table
Units table shows all columns: Daire No, Kat, Tip, m², Fiyat, Durum
Backend API: Create project with units (201)
Backend API: Get project with units (200)
Backend API: Update project units (200)
Backend API: Delete project with units (200)
Backend API: All unit status values work (available, sold, reserved)
Backend API: All room types work (1+0 to 5+1)
seed_data_creation: Created test units for Business Plaza Tower project (B101, B201, B301)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daire Yönetimi feature fully implemented and tested. Table-based UI replaces JSON textarea. All CRUD operations work. Test project with units: Business Plaza Tower (ab0ebf95-fd73-41e5-ba05-41d15551ecc7)
